name: Arcane Sweeper (Trinket)

active.effects: Summons a mist over the target location for 5 seconds, granting {{tip|sight}} of the area in a 375 radius and {{tip|true sight|revealing}} enemy {{tip|stealthed trap|traps}} within for 3 seconds (30 second cooldown; 800 range).

effects_structured.raw: Summon mist over the target area for 5 seconds, reveal the area in 375 radius, and reveal enemy stealthed traps for 3 seconds (30 second cooldown; 800 range).

simpleDescription: Activate to reveal a nearby area of the map

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Arcane Sweeper is a targeted trinket cast (800 range) that creates a 5-second vision field, while true-sight trap revealing lasts 3 seconds within the same 375-radius area.
Mode/availability note: Arcane Sweeper is Arena-scoped and cannot be activated in the first 120 seconds of game time.
